name: Impossible Seafood Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Shredded process sharp American cheese
3 tbsp cream cheese, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Grease a pie plate (10 x 11/2 inch).
3. Mix crabmeat, cheeses, onions, and pimiento in the pie plate.
4. Beat remaining ingredients until smooth (15 seconds in blender or 1 minute with hand beater).
5. Pour mixture into the pie plate.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted between the center and edge comes out clean.
7. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Note: If using fresh crabmeat (1 can, 6 oz, drained) or shrimp (1 can, 4 1/2 oz, well rinsed and drained), substitute accordingly in place of frozen crabmeat.
